title: api-runner: implement step chaining (dynamic placeholder extraction from response)
description: Test iss-192-save-api fails with unresolved {draft_filename} placeholder. Root cause: api-runner.sh does not support extracting values from previous step responses and injecting them into subsequent API calls. Two fix attempts (retryCount=2) addressed unrelated curl issues, never tackled step chaining. Need to design chaining syntax in test YAML and implement extraction/injection logic in api-runner.sh.
